crash_detection._comment: Heartbeat is updated after every browser/SSH/API tool call. If the last_heartbeat on an 'active' session is older than this threshold, the session is treated as crashed and offered for resume on the next /e2e-test-specialist:start (or the user can /e2e-test-specialist:resume directly). Set this above your longest legitimate single-step duration (apt lock waits up to 900s; image transfers can be 5-10 min on slow networks). Decision point — see scripts/retry-policy.sh and scripts/directive-check.sh.

retry._comment: Defaults applied by scripts/retry-policy.sh. The script is the source of truth for per-step-kind logic.

directives._comment: Global enforcement modes. blocking = abort, warning = require explicit confirmation, advisory = log only. Per-directive override lives in the directives.enforcement column.
